title: DRDO is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: DRDO is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DRDO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About DRDO:
DRDO is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO!
